question: Mirror sign convention: when is p positive?
answer: Real object in front of mirror (p > 0).

question: Mirror sign convention: when is q positive?
answer: Real image in front of mirror (q > 0). Virtual image behind (q < 0).

question: Mirror sign convention: concave mirror f and R?
answer: Both positive (center of curvature in front).

Lens sign convention: when is p positive?
answer: Real object to the left (in front) of lens (p > 0).

question: Lens sign convention: when is q positive?
answer: Real image to the right (behind) lens (q > 0). Virtual image to left (q < 0).

Total internal reflection: condition?
answer: θ1 > θc, where sin(θc) = n2/n1 (n1 > n2). No refraction, all reflected.
